Locally owned in the Smokies since 2016

You bought the cabin for the mountains, not a second job

Haven is a local team that runs your Gatlinburg, Pigeon Forge, Sevierville, or Wears Valley rental end to end, so the calendar fills, reviews stay strong, and you get your time back.

Book a Call About Your Property See how it works
★★★★★ 4.9 · 4,000+ Google reviews Airbnb Superhost
Airbnb Superhost Local guest care

Scrolling verified five-star reviews from Google Maps

★★★★★

"We had such a great stay at this cabin! The hosts deserve a gold medal for communication—they respond so fast it almost feels like they're sitting in the living room with you. Super helpful and even offered to send maintenance out the very next day if needed. The cabin itself? BEAUTIFUL. Spacious, clean, and those mountain views… wow. The hot tub was the ultimate relaxation spot and the game room was a hit with kids and adults. The guest portal was a nice touch too. Only downside? Having to leave. 10/10 would absolutely stay again!"

Jewel LarreaEdited a month ago
★★★★★

"A superb stay! Loved everything about the cabin. Great location, and furnished to a very high standard. We stayed for 10 days and never tired of the views and peace and quiet. We will definitely be returning at the earliest opportunity!"

Tara King2 months ago
★★★★★

"Location was only 10 min from downtown Gatlinburg. The mountain location was amazing for bear sightings—we saw more bears up close here than in the Smoky Mountains! Inside was extremely clean and spacious with mountain views to die for. We used the pool table and hot tub. Well stocked and hosts were always communicative. Would certainly recommend!"

Nicolea month ago
★★★★★

"My family of 6 had an amazing stay at this cabin; the hosts were very responsive. The cabin has an outstanding view, perfectly stocked with all the essentials. The theater room was a huge hit with the kids. If you are looking for a beautiful secluded cabin this is it!"

Jennifer Spells2 months ago
★★★★★

"My family and I had such a wonderful stay. They were very quick with responding to any needs or questions, so polite—the cabin was super clean and spacious! We loved the views from our balcony. Peaceful and we enjoyed seeing the farm animals down the road. We would definitely stay here again!"

Amanda Infinger7 months ago
★★★★★

"We had a great stay! I really loved the cabin feel and the quiet area. The hot tub was fabulous after a busy day walking around the local towns!"

Sharon Berga month ago
★★★★★

"My husband and I stayed here for 8 days and it was absolute paradise! Jordan was super responsive and so nice. The home was very peaceful and the views were amazing from the deck. We loved the indoor heated pool and movie room. This home is perfect for R&R—you will have everything you can possibly need. We definitely hope to be back!"

Kim LeeTrom9 months ago
★★★★★

"Our stay was amazing and relaxing—felt right at home. The home was cozy and had everything we needed. Not far from the strip at all. Thank you Dylan and Suzanne for being so kind through a situation we had with our car; they gave us an extra day free. We will definitely be staying here again when we come back to Pigeon Forge."

Adrian Hall3 months ago
★★★★★

"It was a cute cabin. My husband and I loved the cozy feel and we were shocked with how close we were to all the attractions. Sad we couldn't stay longer but still managed to have a great time. Thank you again for allowing us to stay in the cabin."

Rachael Davis2 months ago
★★★★★

"My family's stay at the Hillbilly Hilton was great. We had plenty of space and everything we needed. Plenty of parking—we easily fit 4 cars out front. The views from the main floor balcony were amazing. Plenty of bathrooms and comfy beds. Hot tub was great and got used a few times. I would definitely recommend staying here."

Daniel Arjona8 months ago
★★★★★

"We can't say enough great things about our stay! Dylan was incredibly responsive when we needed a last-minute place for our 18th anniversary. The space is modern, cozy, and truly felt like a home away from home. By far our favorite place to stay in Tennessee!"

Abby Duncan8 months ago
★★★★★

"We met up with family here and had such a wonderful stay. The kids absolutely loved the hot tub and had so much fun sharing the bunk bed room together. Our favorite part was the beautiful mountain views—it made the whole stay feel extra special. We would definitely recommend this place!"

Sarah Koceja3 months ago
★★★★★

"We had an absolutely wonderful stay at this spacious home. The views were breathtaking—waking up to the mountains each morning was truly unforgettable. The house was spotless, beautifully maintained, and had more than enough room for everyone. We have already booked for next year. Highly recommend!"

Karla Martinez4 months ago
★★★★★

"Beautiful cabin. It was a fantastic week's stay. Had all the comforts of home available. Gorgeous view. Jacuzzi tub, hot tub, pool table and video games. Can't wait to go back and stay again."

Dena Simmons4 months ago
★★★★★

"Such a wonderful cabin! The hosts were very accommodating and easy to get in touch with. We saw a couple of bears from the safety of the deck. The home was very clean and comfortable. We enjoyed the pool table, video games, and board games. The hot tub was spotless with a wonderful view."

Sherry Brewer8 months ago
★★★★★

"We had such a great stay at this cabin! The hosts deserve a gold medal for communication—they respond so fast it almost feels like they're sitting in the living room with you. Super helpful and even offered to send maintenance out the very next day if needed. The cabin itself? BEAUTIFUL. Spacious, clean, and those mountain views… wow. The hot tub was the ultimate relaxation spot and the game room was a hit with kids and adults. The guest portal was a nice touch too. Only downside? Having to leave. 10/10 would absolutely stay again!"

Jewel LarreaEdited a month ago
★★★★★

"A superb stay! Loved everything about the cabin. Great location, and furnished to a very high standard. We stayed for 10 days and never tired of the views and peace and quiet. We will definitely be returning at the earliest opportunity!"

Tara King2 months ago

"Location was only 10 min from downtown Gatlinburg. The mountain location was amazing for bear sightings—we saw more bears up close here than in the Smoky Mountains! Inside was extremely clean and spacious with mountain views to die for. We used the pool table and hot tub. Well stocked and hosts were always communicative. Would certainly recommend!"

"My family of 6 had an amazing stay at this cabin; the hosts were very responsive. The cabin has an outstanding view, perfectly stocked with all the essentials. The theater room was a huge hit with the kids. If you are looking for a beautiful secluded cabin this is it!"

We loved the indoor heated pool and movie room. This home is perfect for R&R—you will have everything you can possibly need. We definitely hope to be back!"

The views from the main floor balcony were amazing. Plenty of bathrooms and comfy beds. Hot tub was great and got used a few times. I would definitely recommend staying here."

"We met up with family here and had such a wonderful stay. The kids absolutely loved the hot tub and had so much fun sharing the bunk bed room together. Our favorite part was the beautiful mountain views—it made the whole stay feel extra special. We would definitely recommend this place!"

"Beautiful cabin. It was a fantastic week's stay. Had all the comforts of home available. Gorgeous view. Jacuzzi tub, hot tub, pool table and video games. Can't wait to go back and stay again."

Dena Simmons4 months ago
★★★★★

"Such a wonderful cabin! The hosts were very accommodating and easy to get in touch with. We saw a couple of bears from the safety of the deck. The home was very clean and comfortable. We enjoyed the pool table, video games, and board games. The hot tub was spotless with a wonderful view."

Sherry Brewer8 months ago
Listed & ranked across airbnb Vrbo Booking.com Marriott Google
The Haven difference

The story most owners tell us before they call

It usually starts the same way. The cabin was supposed to build wealth and give you a place in the mountains. Then the guest messages started at dinner. A cleaner no-showed before a big weekend. You opened your calendar and could not tell if your rate was too high, too low, or just wrong for what was happening in town. You are not failing. You are one person trying to run a small hospitality business from afar.

That is the gap Haven was built to close. We are a full-service vacation rental management company based in Sevier County, not a national call center. When a guest is locked out at eleven at night or a pipe needs eyes before check-in, someone who knows your home is minutes away. We handle pricing, listings, housekeeping, maintenance, compliance, and the reviews that decide whether platforms show your cabin to the next guest.

We stay intentionally smaller than the big regional managers. A select portfolio means your property gets real attention, a revenue manager who knows this market, and a guest experience strong enough to compound. That is why Haven homes tend to run about thirty percent ahead of market on revenue, with 4.9 stars across 4,000+ Google reviews and listings in the top tiers on Airbnb.

Locally owned and operated
About us

Owning a profitable vacation rental should be easy

Most vacation rentals never live up to their potential. They are underbooked, take too much time to manage, or just cause too many headaches. Sometimes even the property management companies that promise to make you more profitable end up charging so much that you lose the additional profit they helped create.

At Haven Vacation Rentals, we believe making passive income from vacation rentals should feel a lot more passive. As property owners ourselves, we know how important it is for each property to earn as much as it possibly can without taking up a bunch of your time.

Run it like we own it.Keep costs low. Fix issues fast. Book it full.
Wow our guests.Anticipate their needs. Communicate clearly. Make them want to come back.
Full-service management

We handle everything. You earn more.

Full-service means one local team owns the whole operation. From the first inquiry to the final review, everything below is handled for you, not sold back as surprise add-ons later.

Bookings & calendar

We list, sync, and optimize your calendar across Airbnb, Vrbo, Booking.com, and direct, so every open night works hard.

Smart human pricing

A real revenue manager who knows this market adjusts your rates daily around demand, events, and seasonality.

Marketing & listings

Professional photography, written-to-convert listings, and multi-channel distribution that puts your cabin in front of more guests.

Housekeeping & turnovers

Vetted local cleaners, hotel-grade standards, and inspected turnovers between every stay.

24/7 guest communication

We answer guests fast, day or night, so small questions never become bad reviews.

Maintenance & contractors

We coordinate trusted local trades and handle issues before they reach you or your guests.

Direct deposit payouts

Clean monthly owner statements and reliable direct-deposit payouts. Reporting you can read without a spreadsheet chase.

Reviews & reputation

A guest-obsessed experience that earns the five-star reviews that drive future bookings and revenue.

How it works

Hassle-free from day one

You hand us the keys. We run the day-to-day operation and the income lands in your account.

1

We rent it out

Professional listings and marketing across Airbnb, Vrbo, Booking.com, and direct.

2

We manage it

Inspected turnovers, trusted local maintenance, and smart human pricing every day.

3

We wow guests

24/7 communication and five-star care that earns reviews, rebookings, and referrals.

4

You get paid

Clean monthly statements and direct-deposit payouts. The math is always honest.

By the numbers

The numbers behind the difference

Gross figures from Haven-managed homes. Professional pricing and guest care are what move your net.

AirbnbSuperhost
+30%Revenue ahead of the market
4.9★Across 4,000+ Google reviews
Top 1%Of Airbnb listings worldwide
Why owners switch

Why local, guest-obsessed management nets you more in 2026

Revenue is not set by an algorithm guessing from a distance. A real revenue manager who lives in this market adjusts your rates around local demand, events, holidays, and seasonality. That human judgment, paired with daily attention, is how Haven owners stay roughly thirty percent ahead of market on revenue. In a year when average nightly rates hold near three hundred twenty-one dollars and new supply growth has cooled to about one percent, the winners are not lucky. They are operated well.

The other half is the guest. We answer fast, day or night, so a small question never becomes a one-star review. Inspected turnovers, trusted local maintenance, and a team that treats your reviews like balance sheet line items. Happy guests rebook, refer, and leave five-star ratings that lift search rank, occupancy, and rate over time.

Here is the bottom line owners care about. You should understand your monthly statement and trust the deposit that hits your account. We keep owner reporting clear and predictable, without markups buried in cleaning or booking lines. Compare that to the last manager who made you do math every month, and you will feel why owners switch and stay.

01

A local team

We are based right here in the Smoky Mountains, not in a call center three time zones away. When something needs a person on-site, we are minutes from your door.

02

Smart human pricing

A real revenue manager who knows this market sets your rates, not just an algorithm guessing from afar. That is how Haven owners run ahead of the market.

03

Guest-obsessed

A five-star guest experience is the engine of profit. Happy guests leave five-star reviews, rebook, and refer, which lifts your ranking and your rate.

Owner stories

Hear it from Haven owners

Real owners on what changed when a local team took over the day-to-day.

The honest comparison

Self-managing vs. a national manager vs. Haven

Where your time and your revenue actually go.

Capability Self-managing National manager Haven
Local team, minutes from your cabinNoNoYes
Rates set by a real revenue managerNoAlgorithmYes
24/7 five-star guest communicationNoYesYes
Time you spend each weekAll of itSomeAlmost none
Revenue vs. the marketAt or belowAbout market~30% ahead
Where we manage

Four Smoky Mountain markets

Each market has its own rules, demand patterns, and guest profile. We have a dedicated page for every one.

Gatlinburg

In-town walkability and the zoning angle that protects rentals.

Explore

Pigeon Forge

High demand, occupancy caps, and grandfathering you need to know.

Explore

Sevierville

The emerging value market with room to run on revenue.

Explore

Wears Valley

County rules, the Three Strikes policy, and an uncontested gap.

Explore
Questions

What owners ask first

Management fees depend on your property, your market, and the services your home needs. We walk through the full picture on a call, show you what similar cabins earn under professional management, and give you straight numbers before you commit to anything.

What owners tell us they value is alignment: incentives that reward performance, clear monthly reporting, and no mystery line items. We will cover exactly how that works for your cabin when we talk.

We manage cabins and vacation rentals across Sevier County, including Gatlinburg, Pigeon Forge, Sevierville, and Wears Valley. Because we are based locally, our team can be on-site quickly when a home needs hands-on attention. Each market has its own rules, demand patterns, and guest profile, and we have a dedicated page for each one so you can see how we approach your specific area.

Bookings and calendar management across Airbnb, Vrbo, Booking.com, and direct; smart human revenue pricing; professional marketing and listings; housekeeping with inspected turnovers; 24/7 guest communication; maintenance through trusted local contractors; clean monthly statements with direct-deposit payouts; and active management of your reviews and reputation. You hand us the keys and we run the day-to-day operation.

Haven-managed homes run roughly 30 percent ahead of the market on revenue. Your specific potential depends on your cabin's location, size, condition, and amenities. During our evaluation we look at your property and comparable rentals in your market, then show you what it can realistically earn under professional management before you commit to anything.

Both, with the person in charge. We use pricing tools as inputs, but a real revenue manager who knows this market sets and adjusts your rates around local demand, events, and seasonality. An algorithm alone cannot tell that a specific weekend will spike because of a local event, or that a slow stretch needs a smart adjustment to stay booked. Human judgment on top of good data is how our owners stay ahead of the market.

The process is straightforward. First, we evaluate your property and your market and show you the numbers. Second, we recommend the profitable improvements that lift your listing and your rate. Third, we take over the day-to-day and you start earning more while we handle bookings, pricing, guests, cleaning, and maintenance. It begins with a single, no-pressure call about your property.

Let's talk about what your cabin could earn

Make your passive income more passive, with more income

If you want a local team that prices your home like a professional, treats guests like the asset they are, and gives you an honest read on the numbers, we should talk. No pressure and no script. Book a call about your property and see what management built for the 2026 Smoky Mountain market can do for you.

Book a Call About Your Property 865-263-7366

Book a call about your property

Tell us about your cabin and we will show you what it can earn with Haven. No pressure, no obligation.

By submitting you agree to be contacted by Haven about managing your property. We never share your information.

Thanks. Your request is in. We are sending you to the scheduler now. Prefer to talk now? Call 865-263-7366.

Smoky Mountain vacation rental management, run by a local team. Full-service property management for cabin and vacation rental owners across Gatlinburg, Pigeon Forge, Sevierville, and Wears Valley.
